entity.summary: Ethereum zkRollup-based decentralized exchange operated by the Loopring team. Loopring Exchange launched in late February 2020 and later supported order-book trading, AMM swaps, and other Layer 2 functions. On June 28, 2026, the team ended all DEX trading and took the relayer offline, citing weak adoption, architectural limitations, and an inability to sustain the project.
entity.notes: HEI models the exchange service as Loopring DEX rather than treating every Loopring protocol, wallet, and DeFi product as a separate exchange entity. The official site now states that Loopring has shut down. Death reason is voluntary_shutdown because the operator announced and executed an orderly termination rather than an external enforcement, acquisition, exploit, or insolvency proceeding.

events.title: Loopring Exchange launched in late February 2020
events.description: The Loopring team launched its zkRollup-based decentralized exchange at Loopring.io in late February 2020.
events.notes: The official April 2020 API announcement states that Loopring Exchange had launched in late February; HEI stores a month-level date.

events.title: Loopring DEX trading and relayer shut down
events.description: Loopring announced that all DEX trading services would cease immediately and took the relayer offline on June 28, 2026.
events.notes: The operator described a final-balance review and direct distribution process for remaining user assets.

evidence.title: Loopring Exchange Launches API
evidence.notes: Official post says Loopring Exchange launched in late February 2020 and identifies it as the first decentralized trading platform built on the Loopring zkRollup protocol.

evidence.title: Loopring Protocol and Exchange introduction
evidence.notes: Official developer documentation identifies Loopring Exchange as a decentralized trading platform built on the Loopring zkRollup protocol.

evidence.title: Sunsetting Loopring DEX
evidence.notes: Official shutdown statement says trading services ceased immediately and the relayer was taken offline.

evidence.title: Ethereum zkRollup project Loopring sunsets DEX, citing lack of meaningful adoption
evidence.notes: Independent report confirms the immediate DEX shutdown, relayer termination, and planned direct return of remaining user assets.

evidence.title: Loopring has shut down
evidence.notes: The official site now states that Loopring has shut down and is no longer operational.
